title: Ender Cats
description: Adds some cute Ender Cats to Minecraft!
body:
Here's a little mod I made that adds a cute little cat called a meower.
They're suppose to spawn in all the End biomes. But, im still bug fixing it.
you'll have the spawn egg still. They also drop ender pearls.
**PLEASE REPORT BUGS!!!** I'll try to fix them.
I'm hoping to add many more custom mobs and eventually expand to items, blocks, 
tools, and armor. Let me know your thoughts! :3
